notes: Items at Ember & Ash. Mostly objects sitting on the desk or in the warehouse — the rolled plans, the bourbon, the phone, the brick stamped 1947. Antonio has no bindle to assemble — his win is progress toward the buildout, not an artifact carried out.

bourbon_bottle.title: Bourbon · half-empty since Wednesday
bourbon_bottle.flavor: From the file cabinet bottom drawer. Half-empty in the way a half-empty bottle is half-empty when nobody else has been pouring.

rolled_plans.title: Architectural Plans · Rolled
rolled_plans.flavor: The architect's plans for Ember & Ash. You loved them in May. You have not unrolled them in three weeks.

the_call_sheet.title: Call Sheet · 14 missed
the_call_sheet.flavor: A spiral notebook in which you have, by Tuesday, written down the times of every Q. Paul call. Fourteen calls. Two pickups. Twelve voicemails. The math is the message.

lila_bao_signed_letter.title: Lila Bao · Signed Letter of Intent · May
lila_bao_signed_letter.flavor: Signed in May. She has, since July, sent three-line emails. The letter is on D'AMBROSIO LLC letterhead. It is in the cabinet under the bourbon.

the_lafayette_receipt.title: Receipt · Lafayette Salvage · cypress beam
the_lafayette_receipt.flavor: The receipt for the cypress beam from the salvage yard outside Lafayette. The amount you paid is, in your own handwriting in the corner, more than you should have.

brick_1947.title: Brick · stamped 1947
brick_1947.flavor: From a torn-down convent. The salvage yard had a pallet of them. You bought the whole pallet. This one has 1947 stamped into the long side.

wrong_gauge_pipe.title: Wrong-Gauge Pipe · 3/4"
wrong_gauge_pipe.flavor: A foot of three-quarter-inch pipe. Wrong gauge for the gas line you actually need. The supplier insists this is what you ordered.

two_foot_cypress_offcut.title: Cypress Offcut · two feet
two_foot_cypress_offcut.flavor: A two-foot offcut from the salvage beam. Smells like the kind of wood the Demons in Frasier's workshop would talk to if they were here. They are not.

foremans_clipboard.title: Foreman's Clipboard
foremans_clipboard.flavor: The foreman's day sheet. Tasks marked in his hand, in three different colors of pen. The cypress beam is in red. The kitchen rough-in is in blue. Most of the rest is in black.

the_crew_radio.title: The Crew Radio · on a milk crate
the_crew_radio.flavor: A small bluetooth speaker on a milk crate. Spanish, then salsa, then sometimes a song from a band one of the carpenters' kids is in. The crew agreed on it; you have not voted on it.
